title: Steam Page Launch
objective: Replay rising whistle-and-pressure patterns on four brass launch valves, then decide whether to launch now and bank your wishlist combo or risk one more pulse for a bigger score.

controls.outcome: Inputs that valve's steam tone in sequence order.

controls.input: Press and hold a valve with a red ring
controls.outcome: Completes a long-note pulse worth extra combo.

controls.input: Tap the central LAUNCH gauge after a correct round
controls.outcome: Banks current combo into score before the next pattern adds risk.

steps: A short steam-whistle pattern plays across 4 valves.
The player replays the exact pattern by tapping the matching valves.
Every 2 rounds, a launch event mutates the rules for the next pattern: one pulse may need a hold, one valve may be blocked by steam, or the
After a correct replay, the player chooses to launch immediately for safe points or continue for a higher multiplier.
A wrong input, missed hold, or full overpressure meter ends the run.
scoring: Each correct pulse adds points; flawless rounds raise a wishlist multiplier. Launching banks the multiplier, while pushing to the next round increases it further. Bonus points come from surviving twist rounds and perfect
tips: Listen first; each valve has a distinct whistle pitch.
Launch before a crowded pattern if your overpressure meter is high.
Blocked valves force route changes, so watch the steam clouds before replaying.
Held red-ring pulses are the fastest way to spike combo if you nail them.

trendContext.title: Launching a Steam page, how many wishlists do YOU expect?
